entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the crop evaluated for resistance to downy mildew

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet genotypes to resist infection by Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: IAC
entities.description: A research location where field tests were conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A geographical region where field tests were conducted

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A geographical region where field tests were conducted

entities.name: PATHOTYPES
entities.description: Host-specific strains of Sclerospora graminicola used for evaluation

entities.name: SPRAY-INOCULATION
entities.description: The process of applying a sporangial suspension to seedlings

entities.name: GLASSHOUSE
entities.description: The controlled environment where spray-inoculation experiments were performed

entities.name: LATENT PERIOD
entities.description: The time interval between inoculation and the appearance of disease symptoms

entities.name: DISEASE INCIDENCE
entities.description: The percentage of plants showing disease symptoms

entities.name: HOST RESISTANCE INDEX
entities.description: A calculated measure of resistance stability based on disease incidence and latent period

entities.name: HOST GENOTYPE
entities.description: The genetic variation among the pearl millet genotypes evaluated
